column12: Measurement condition : Ice; Cloudy , No Precipitation ,

column14: Shovelled out both banks to create open-water wading mmnt section. Strung tagline so majority of flow on right bank was perpendicular. This tagline orientation caused angle warnings on left bank. Standard error of velocity warnings are valid due to turbulent flow. Sudden depth changes valid due to cobbly x-section and steep bedrock outcrop on right bank.   Corrected M.G.H. includes Sensor Reset Correction of -0.002 and Gage Correction of 0.000 applied to Weighted M.G.H of 2.321 Oline purged at 1000PST - purge sounded clear and bubbling well in channel.
